title: Common definitions for Project Brief Schema
description: Reusable definitions and field wrapper used across the Project Brief modular schema.

completionScore.description: How complete the AI believes the field is

sourceAttribution.description: List of source identifiers or URIs used by the AI

reasoning.description: Short explanation of AI reasoning for this field

conflicts.description: Identifiers of conflicting fields or notes

missingDependencies.description: IDs of fields this item depends on but are missing

searchable.description: Whether this field should be included in full‑text/vector search

sensitive.description: Mark as sensitive/PII; such fields are excluded from embeddings

locale.description: Optional locale override for the field (BCP-47). Null means inherit document locale.

fieldMeta.description: Structured metadata required for every field

fieldWrapper.description: Generic wrapper: every logical field is an object with `meta` and `value`. `meta` contains administrative and AI metadata; `value` contains the typed content.

personRef.description: Lightweight person reference used in stakeholders and users
